title: NewMount Capital Management Ltd - Withdrawal of AIFM authorization
text:
6 March 2026
CySEC Board Decision
Announcement date: 06.03.2026 Board decision date: 02.03.2026
Regarding: NewMount Capital Management Ltd
Legislation: The Alternative Investment Fund Managers Law
Subject: Withdrawal of AIFM authorization
Judicial Review: N/A Judicial Review N/A
Ruling:
The Cyprus Securities and Exchange Commission (‘CySEC’) announces that, on its meeting
of 2 March 2026, has decided, pursuant to section 12(1)(a) of the Alternative Investment
Fund Managers Law, to withdraw the Alternative Investment Fund Manager
authorization of the company NewMount Capital Management Ltd, with number
AIFM66/56/2013, as it has renounced its authorization.
mko/
1
legislation: The Alternative Investment Fund Managers Law
subject: Withdrawal of AIFM authorization
